title: Procurement Table
description: Editable lab procurement and equipment-loan register for cross-project hardware
summary: Editable register for lab purchases and equipment loans. Quoted packages cover Flexiv Rizon 4s x2, xArm7 x2, optical tables x2, FACTR-Franka x2, and one Wuji Hand2 left/right pair with a Wuji motion-capture glove pair. The bimanual base is RealMan x2 versus Tianji CCS 696 x2; an additional open-source dexterous-hand pair is ROBOTIS HX5 versus MIDAS Hand. Three DaiMeng loan bundles are planned for Singapore: a DM-DataMaster teleoperation set, a new-generation UMI DM-DataClaw/DM-DataPacket set, and a DM-DateDex glove pair. Quote PDFs and loan documents stay private and are referenced only by safe inventory details. Rows are sorted by status first and then by last update; received items remain behind the bottom archive toggle.

intro_table.caption: Editable purchase and equipment-loan register · blank pending, dash ordered/loan confirmed, check arrived

rows.item: Planned DaiMeng loan: DM-DataMaster Hand + DM-DataMaster Station / 戴盟遥操作设备借测套装
rows.route: DaiMeng loan · confirm handover scope before possible Singapore hand-carry on 2026-08-05
rows.notes: Purpose: reproduce the DaiMeng gripper teleoperation and test platform in Singapore. Requested inventory: DM25TO02H000 DM-DataMaster Hand x1 and DM25TO02S000 DM-DataMaster Station (stand version) x1. Before the handover is marked confirmed, freeze the complete packing list: gloves, station/stand, controllers, power supplies, chargers, cables, mounting hardware, calibration files, firmware/SDK and operating instructions. Record asset or serial numbers, working-condition evidence, lender/borrower owners, customs or temporary-loan paperwork, transport restrictions, handover date and return date; do not store signatures or private documents in the dashboard.

rows.item: Planned DaiMeng loan: 2x DM-DataClaw + DM-DataPacket / 戴盟新版 UMI 借测套装
rows.route: DaiMeng loan · confirm handover scope before possible Singapore hand-carry on 2026-08-05
rows.notes: Purpose: update the existing Singapore V1 UMI setup with the newer DaiMeng collection hardware. Requested inventory: DM25DA03G000 DM-DataClaw x2 and DM25DA03P000 DM-DataPacket x1. Confirm both grippers, backpack/packet unit, batteries and chargers, storage media, cables, mounts, spare consumables, firmware/SDK, calibration files, synchronization path and V1 data/schema compatibility. Record asset or serial numbers, a pre-handover capture smoke test, customs or temporary-loan paperwork, transport restrictions, responsible owners, handover date and return terms.

rows.item: Planned DaiMeng loan: 2x DM-DateDex data-collection gloves / 戴盟无本体数采手套一对
rows.route: DaiMeng loan · confirm handover scope before possible Singapore hand-carry on 2026-08-05
rows.notes: Purpose: collect dexterous-hand tactile data in Singapore. Requested inventory: DM26DA04H000 DM-DateDex x2, treated as one glove pair. Confirm left/right configuration, glove sizes, tactile and pose channels, raw-data access, sampling and synchronization interfaces, controller/receiver, batteries and chargers, cables, software, calibration files and one acquisition smoke test. Record asset or serial numbers, working-condition evidence, customs or temporary-loan paperwork, transport restrictions, responsible owners, handover date and return terms.

rows.item: 2x Flexiv Rizon 4s robot arms + RDK/TDK / 非夕 Rizon 4s 机械臂 ×2
rows.route: TechVantage quote TV120626NUS · refresh required
rows.notes: Quote received: NUS Quote TV120626NUS(2).pdf, dated 2026-06-12 and valid for one month, so a refreshed quotation is now required. Scope: 2x Rizon 4s arms with control boxes, teach pendants and base brackets, plus RDK x2 and TDK x2. Quoted total USD 92,000 excluding VAT; CIF to destination port with NUS handling customs; stated lead time 60 days, 100% payment before production and one-year warranty. Keep unpurchased pending refreshed validity, landed-cost confirmation and comparison against xArm and the selected bimanual platform.

rows.item: 2x xArm7 robot arms / xArm7 机械臂 ×2
rows.route: KING Technology quote 2026050801 · refresh required
rows.notes: Quote received: Quotation xarm7+tables+ Factr v2(2).pdf, dated 2026-05-08 with validity through 2026-06-23, so a refreshed quotation is required. Scope: xArm7 x2 at USD 8,950 each, USD 17,900 total; stated lead time 4-6 weeks and one-year warranty. The combined DDP package also contains FACTR-Franka x2 and two optical tables. Keep unpurchased until the refreshed quote confirms controllers, software licenses, end-effector interfaces, safety accessories, table bolt patterns and the final purchasing entity.

rows.item: Bimanual platform option A: 2x RealMan arms + DaiMeng gripper / 双臂候选 A：睿尔曼 ×2 + 戴盟夹爪
rows.route: RealMan/Romoya · quote missing · choose against Tianji CCS 696
rows.notes: Mutually exclusive bimanual-base option A; purchase either this RealMan pair or the Tianji CCS 696 pair, not both. No RealMan quotation is present in the supplied three PDFs. Request the exact arm model, pair price, payload/reach, controller and SDK, force-control capability, mounting hardware, warranty and lead time, then include the DaiMeng gripper electrical/mechanical adapter, collision and E-stop setup, delivery destination and acceptance owner in the comparison.

rows.item: Bimanual platform option B: 2x Tianji CCS 696 arms + DaiMeng gripper / 双臂候选 B：天机 CCS 696 ×2 + 戴盟夹爪
rows.route: Tianji CCS 696 vendor · quote pending · selected over M6 Lite · choose against RealMan
rows.notes: Mutually exclusive bimanual-base option B; purchase either this Tianji CCS 696 pair or the RealMan pair, not both. CCS 696 is selected over M6 Lite for the Tianji option: each CCS 696 arm is specified at 6 kg payload and 695 mm reach, versus 5 kg payload and 615 mm reach for M6 Lite. Neither Tianji model is covered by the three supplied quotation PDFs, so obtain a separate CCS 696 quote for two arms. Compare pair price, controller and SDK openness, force-control and synchronization support, mounting footprint, warranty, lead time, local support and the DaiMeng gripper adapter effort using the same acceptance sheet as RealMan.

rows.item: Wuji Hand2 left/right pair + Wuji motion-capture glove pair / 舞肌二代灵巧手一对 + 数据手套一对
rows.route: Wuji quote WJ202607150864/WJ202607150865 · approval pending
rows.notes: Quote received: Quotation_for_NUS_260715(1).pdf, dated 2026-07-15. Scope: Wuji Hand2_R x1 at USD 13,000, Wuji Hand2_L x1 at USD 13,000, and one Wuji Glove Motion Capture Version pair at USD 4,000; total USD 30,000. Terms state DAP with buyer self-clearance for customs, TT payment in full, 6-8 week shipment time and a seven-day inspection period after receipt. This remains an intended purchase; confirm controller and power package, raw glove/hand interfaces, tactile configuration, arm adapters, customs handling, warranty details and acceptance owner before approval.

rows.item: Open-source dexterous-hand option A: ROBOTIS HAND HX5-D20-MRT left/right pair / 开源灵巧手候选 A
rows.route: Taobao candidate · choose against MIDAS Hand
rows.notes: Mutually exclusive open-source hand option A; buy one left/right pair only after comparison with MIDAS Hand. This is an additional modifiable hand pair alongside the quoted Wuji Hand2 purchase, not a replacement for Wuji. The listing identifies ROBOTIS HAND HX5-D20-MRT and nine sensors. Confirm the exact left/right SKUs and pair price, source repository and license, CAD/BOM, firmware and controller, raw sensor access, tactile channel layout, spare parts, arm adapters and whether sensor additions can be made without breaking the control stack.

rows.item: Open-source dexterous-hand option B: MIDAS Hand tactile/force-feedback pair / 开源灵巧手候选 B
rows.route: Taobao candidate · choose against ROBOTIS HX5
rows.notes: Mutually exclusive open-source hand option B; buy one left/right pair only after comparison with ROBOTIS HX5. This is an additional modifiable hand pair alongside the quoted Wuji Hand2 purchase, not a replacement for Wuji. The listing describes an open-source MIDAS Hand with tactile sensing and force feedback. Confirm whether the selected SKU is one hand or a left/right pair, source repository and license, CAD/BOM, actuator and controller package, tactile raw-data interface, force-feedback implementation, hand-specific firmware, spare parts, arm adapters and the practical effort required to add or replace sensors. Open hardware, lower cost and modifiability are the selection rationale.

rows.item: 2x optical platform tables, 1600 x 1000 x 750 mm / 光学平台工作台 ×2
rows.route: KING Technology quote 2026050801 · refresh required
rows.notes: Quoted in Quotation xarm7+tables+ Factr v2(2).pdf: two 1600 x 1000 x 750 mm optical platform tables at USD 2,815 each, USD 5,630 total, with a stated 4-6 week lead. The quotation expired on 2026-06-23. Refresh the quote after freezing arm allocation and room layout, then confirm payload and stiffness, leveling or casters, xArm/Flexiv/selected-bimanual-arm bolt patterns, cable routing, E-stop and camera mounting, transport constraints and acceptance tests.

rows.item: 2x FACTR-Franka low-cost force-feedback teleoperation hardware / FACTR-Franka ×2
rows.route: KING quote 2026050801 + Taobao candidate · refresh required
rows.notes: Quoted in Quotation xarm7+tables+ Factr v2(2).pdf: FACTR-Franka x2 at USD 1,765 each, USD 3,530 total, with a stated 1-2 week lead. The combined xArm7 + FACTR + table DDP quotation totals USD 32,461.80 including listed shipping, GST and payment-on-account line, but expired on 2026-06-23 and must be refreshed. Keep the Taobao candidate as the purchase link; confirm the exact Franka configuration, gravity compensation, brake/damping and force-feedback behavior, compatibility with the master-arm setup, safety limits, delivery route and reimbursement owner before approval. Taobao share code: CZ001.

rows.item: Arduino MEGA 2560 + expansion board + wiring/power bundle / Arduino MEGA2560、拓展板、TTL线与9V电源
rows.route: Taobao · multiple shops · 订单数据.xlsx + Taobao screenshot
rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09. Corrects the earlier MEGA 2580 wording to the actually ordered Arduino Mega 2560 route. Bundle now includes: Arduino Mega 2560 official board + shell + USB cable, order 3311566538794187054, paid RMB 203.04; YwRobot Mega2560 sensor expansion board / MAGE V2 single board + display, order 3311566538794223064, paid RMB 106.83; DTECH IOT-6553 1.8m USB-to-TTL 4P 3.3V PL2303 serial cable, order 3311566538794213882, paid RMB 55.51; 220V to 9V1A Arduino independent power adapter, order 3311566538794177872, seller shipped per screenshot with ETA 2026-07-23 to 2026-07-26, paid RMB 19.87. After arrival verify board clone/chip, USB driver, shield pinout, analog readout with the linear voltage module, serial packet path, power-supply polarity/noise, and cable strain relief before tactile/haptic bench tests.

rows.item: ElastremeSense Manu-5D wireless data glove kit, right hand / 电子皮肤数据手套无线采集套件（右手）

rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09, order 3311566538794131863, paid RMB 1336.16. SKU: ElastremeSense Manu-5D right-hand wireless acquisition kit. Use as an alternate human-centric hand-data / tactile-glove candidate, not a replacement for MANUS until validated. After arrival verify hand size/fit, wireless stability, SDK or serial/Bluetooth export path, sampling rate, calibration, battery/charging, timestamping, and synchronization with camera/robot logs.

rows.item: FSR402/400/406 single-point force sensors + linear voltage converters / 力敏模块 + 线性电压转换模块
rows.route: Taobao · 维可思科技 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09, order 3311566538794086671, paid RMB 254.78. SKUs: 5x small-range round 4mm FSR sensors without voltage conversion module, and 5x small-range round 7mm linear voltage conversion modules with pads. This replaces the earlier unpurchased HU591 candidate state. Use first for one-finger / one-phalanx haptic bench testing before mounting larger MF287/FPC sensors. After arrival verify resistance curve, converter output range, Arduino analog input wiring, sampling rate, hysteresis, repeatability, and safe isolation from the haptic module.

rows.item: MEMS microphone array kit + Orange Pi Zero2 / 麦克风阵列套装 + 香橙派 ZERO2
rows.route: Taobao · SMD麦克风阵列仓库 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09, order 3311566538794168690, paid RMB 1132.82 including RMB 7 shipping. SKU: MEMS microphone array kit 1 + Orange Pi Zero2 full configuration. Use for audio/contact-sound capture experiments and possible embodied-music / action-sound logging. After arrival verify array geometry, driver support, Orange Pi image, sample rate, synchronization path, latency, mounting, and whether audio can be timestamped with robot/video data.

rows.item: MF287 flexible film grip-force sensor pair + serial collector / 手掌抓握力柔性薄膜传感器 + 串口采集器
rows.route: Taobao · 智男电子 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09, order 3311566538794259891, paid RMB 1585.84. SKU: serial collector + left/right hand pair with rubber glove fixing straps, G0505M-5kg. This replaces the earlier unpurchased MF287 candidate state. Still treat as fit-risk hardware: after arrival compare sensor geometry against Wuji / Lingxin hand finger spacing, side-splay, thumb geometry, bending radius, cable exits, and palm/finger contact zones before robot mounting. Bench first with Arduino/serial readout and one-channel haptic mapping; do not assume it gives contact localization.

rows.item: Safety supervisor cotton armband / 安全监督红袖章
rows.route: Taobao · 正星劳保定制工厂 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Ordered on 2026-07-09, order 3311566538794122681, paid RMB 11.33. SKU: 安全监督, pure-cotton double-layer thickened armband. Use as a visible label for the safety watcher / E-stop supervisor role during real-robot low-speed trials. After arrival verify fit, visibility under lab lighting, and whether it interferes with sleeves or emergency access.

rows.item: WAAAX array thin-film pressure sensors + serial/Bluetooth acquisition module / 阵列式薄膜压力传感器 + 采集模块
rows.route: Taobao · 维可思电子企业店 WAAAX · 订单数据.xlsx

Use for multi-point tactile/pressure-array evaluation alongside the single-point FSR and MF287 routes. After arrival verify active area, scan rate, serial/Bluetooth protocol, calibration load range, spatial cross-talk, cable robustness, and whether the acquisition module can timestamp or stream into the robot data logger.

rows.item: Electronics prototyping batch / 电子开发与线材批次
rows.route: Taobao · multiple shops · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel rows include Dupont jumper wires x2, ESP32 Type-C board with expansion board, Mega2560 Pro Type-C boards x2, 0603 resistor and capacitor sample books, 30AWG five-color wire kits x2, and XGSP80 183C solder paste/flux. Use for lab wiring, embedded prototypes, and repair bench stock; after arrival inventory quantities and keep solder paste/flux labeled.

rows.item: 6x 2m UGREEN USB 3.0 extension cables
rows.route: Taobao · ship to NUS/COM2
rows.notes: Correction 2026-07-08: not arrived yet. Order has been placed and the cables are still in transit; keep this in the yellow ordered/shipping state until actual receipt. Lab previously bought four; current request was six 2m cables.

rows.item: BANFULLY gray cuttable leather desk mat / 灰色可裁剪皮革桌垫
rows.route: Taobao · BANFULLY 品牌专柜店
rows.notes: Boris Taobao screenshot at 2026-07-07 20:59: BANFULLY gray cuttable leather desk mat, medium-gray anti-oil / anti-scald / anti-slip thickened 1.8mm SKU, paid RMB 76.4, status 待发货, seller expected to ship before 2026-07-09 21:00. This is the paid replacement/actual mat despite the earlier canceled grey-mat candidate; after arrival verify slip, cleanability, camera contrast, and whether it deforms or contaminates under robot contact.

rows.item: Black plain photography cloth / 黑色平纹布摄影背景布 2m x 2.45m

rows.notes: Boris Taobao screenshot at 2026-07-07 20:59: black plain fabric backdrop, 2m x 2.45m, paid RMB 47.5, status 待发货, seller expected to ship before 2026-07-09 21:00. Use for photography / vision background; after arrival verify matte behavior, wrinkles, lint, camera contrast, and washability.

rows.item: GX80/H80B 57-stepper driver kit / 57步进 1.2Nm + 驱动套装
rows.route: Taobao · 华芯运控企业店
rows.notes: Boris Taobao screenshot at 2026-07-07 20:59: GX80/H80B accessory SKU, 57-stepper 1.2Nm + driver kit, excludes the module, paid RMB 117, status 待发货, seller expected to ship before 2026-07-09 21:00. Pair with the existing GX80/H80B linear stage row; after arrival verify motor/driver voltage and current limits, cabling, controller compatibility, travel direction, and limit / emergency-stop integration.

rows.item: High-density sponge foam sheet / 高密度海绵薄片垫子 2m x 1m x 1cm
rows.route: Taobao · 兴创造标质专卖店
rows.notes: Boris Taobao screenshot at 2026-07-07 20:59: 2m x 1m x 1.0cm high-density sponge/foam sheet, paid RMB 29.8, status 待发货, seller expected to ship before 2026-07-09 21:00. Use as soft padding / fixture / scene material; after arrival verify thickness, density, flatness, shedding, and compression under robot contact.

rows.item: 10x 3m USB 3.0 extension cables / 3m USB3.0延长线
rows.route: Taobao · 仁朝数码旗舰店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311159846118004652: 10 pieces of 3m straight USB 3.0 male-to-female extension cable, nickel-plated anti-slip SKU. Paid RMB 205.99. After arrival verify USB 3.0 bandwidth, cable stiffness, and camera/sensor stability.

rows.item: 2x 1-to-3 USB-C data/charging cables / 数据线
rows.route: Taobao / supplier · VIVE Tracker + MANUS charging
rows.notes: Excel order 3311159846118040662 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: two Pisen 100W 1-to-3 cables, Type-C input with Type-C+Type-C+Type-C outputs, 2m length. Intended for VIVE Tracker and MANUS charging; confirm charge-only vs data capability after arrival.

rows.item: 4x IMX415 4K USB camera modules / IMX415工业摄像头模组
rows.route: Taobao · 明丽摄像头工厂店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721122681: four IMX415 wide-angle 4K / 8MP USB driverless camera modules, 120-degree no-distortion lens with 1m cable. Paid RMB 1028.97. After arrival verify USB bandwidth, frame rate, exposure controls, lens FOV, mounting, and synchronization feasibility.

rows.item: Digital caliper / 数显游标卡尺 150mm
rows.route: Taobao · syntek旗舰店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721168690: 150mm all-metal IP54 digital caliper. Paid RMB 98.02. After arrival check zeroing, repeatability, battery, and measurement consistency against calibration weights/known blocks.

rows.item: Fasteners and fabrication consumables / 紧固件与加工耗材批次
rows.route: Taobao · multiple shops · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel rows include 4x200 cable ties, stainless M2/M2.5/M3 screw kit x2, M4/M5/M6 screw kit, M2 cylindrical pin kits x2, and M2.5 cylindrical pin kit. After arrival inventory sizes and store by diameter/thread to avoid mixing.

rows.item: Feetech STS3032 servo set / 飞特 STS3032 舵机与转接板
rows.route: Taobao · 深圳飞特舵机工厂店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311768244368177872: three ST-3032-C036 dual-axis magnetic-encoder bus servos plus one FE-URT2-C001 signal conversion board. Paid RMB 645.66. After arrival verify firmware/tooling, bus communication, voltage/current limits, and mechanical fit.

rows.item: GX80/H80B linear stage / 直线滑台导轨模组
rows.route: Taobao · 华芯运控企业店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311768244368350275: GX80/H80B dual-rail ball-screw linear slide, 80mm width, 1204 screw, 400mm effective travel. Paid RMB 300.91. After arrival verify travel, backlash, mounting holes, and motor/driver compatibility.

rows.item: Jenga tower blocks / Jenga叠叠高积木
rows.route: Real-Robot Demos · Taobao / supplier
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721031480 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: large numbered 72-piece Jenga set with wooden hammer and storage bag. For 02 Jenga extraction, target-block marking material, non-slip base / anti-slip mat, owner assignment, and gripper/tactile readiness still need confirmation before run.

rows.item: Lab drying oven / 电热鼓风干燥箱 15.6L
rows.route: Taobao · 途途仪器商城 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311768244368269073: 15.6L stainless-inner timed drying oven with over-temperature alarm, model 101-00B. Paid RMB 1494.45. After arrival verify voltage, temperature control, alarm behavior, ventilation, and material-curing safety rules.

rows.item: Large Rubik-style cube / 大号魔方
rows.route: Real-Robot Demos · Taobao / supplier
rows.notes: Excel order 3311159846118077489 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: product title says oversized 3x3 cube and SKU says 大号三阶魔方【7CM】. For the two 90-degree cube-turn demo, verify actual size, torque, safety, sticker/color contrast, and repeated low-speed robot-turn tolerance.

rows.item: Lego/MOC blocks and baseplates / 积木散件与底板
rows.route: Taobao · Changliu demo procurement
rows.notes: Excel order 3311159846118086671 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: small-particle 40x40cm grey baseplate, 51x38cm green baseplate, and 1000g mixed block pack with baseplate/accessory pack. Verify on arrival whether these satisfy the first-round large-particle requirement or whether a separate large-particle set is still needed.

rows.item: Lego tool-operation demo tool set
rows.route: Taobao · Changliu demo procurement
rows.notes: Excel orders 3311589289721004652 and 3311589289721022298 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: brick hammer + pliers + five-color separators, plus 8mm four-in-one quick removal pliers. After arrival, verify tool size and compatibility with the actual ordered blocks.

rows.item: Mini drill press / 小型迷你台钻
rows.route: Taobao · 芝浦旗舰店 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721532677: plug-in / lithium dual-use mini drill press with 13-piece twist drill set. Paid RMB 332.43. After arrival verify chuck runout, speed control, fixture safety, and drill-bit completeness.

rows.item: PDMS / Sylgard 184 silicone kit
rows.route: Taobao · 艾硕化工电子科技 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721259891: Dow Corning DC184 / Sylgard 184 PDMS, 1.1kg including 100g curing agent. Paid RMB 697.61. After arrival verify A/B ratio, storage, expiration, curing behavior, and optical clarity.

rows.item: Soft-material additives and print stock / 软材料补充批次
rows.route: Taobao · multiple shops · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel rows include 20ml high-concentration 5000ppm platinum catalyst, black TPU90A flexible filament, 10g commercial ZnS:Cu stress/electro/photo-luminescent powder, and 180-2000 grit wet/dry sandpaper sets. After arrival keep materials labeled and verify compatibility before tactile/soft-skin trials.

rows.item: Toy knife for slime-clay cutting / 儿童仿真切菜刀玩具
rows.route: Real-Robot Demos · Taobao / supplier
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721086671 buyer-paid on 2026-07-07: baby-food knife/cutting-board set, SKU 12cm milky-white knife plus 15cm board. For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting: use as blunt-edge toy/safe knife only; keep Stage 0/1 limited to toy knife, washable surface, low speed, and cleanable fixture.

rows.item: UK/Singapore power strip batch / 英标插排批次
rows.route: Taobao · 中国插座直销 · 订单数据.xlsx
rows.notes: Excel order 3311589289721177872: 10 Bull-style UK plug power strips, 6 outlets, overload protection, individual switches, 1.5m cable. Paid RMB 1002.80. After arrival verify plug standard, fuse/overload behavior, cable rating, and lab safety suitability.

rows.route: Taobao · 美创家居专营店
rows.notes: Seller shipped per Boris Taobao screenshot on 2026-07-07. K305D 30V5A three-digit display bench supply for lab electronics / sensor calibration work; after arrival verify voltage/current output, display accuracy, plug/adaptor safety, and a simple load test.

rows.notes: Seller shipped the 5-color 500g pack per Boris Taobao screenshot on 2026-07-07. Excel order 3311589289721077489 also shows a buyer-paid M&G 36-color 360g pack. For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting, after arrival verify cleanability, deformation visibility, and whether it sticks to the toy knife or fixture.

rows.route: Taobao · 普斯顿硅胶企业店
rows.notes: Seller shipped per Boris Taobao screenshot on 2026-07-07. Includes high-transparent 10-degree 500g AB glue plus semitransparent self-defoaming 0/10/20/30-degree 500g samples; after arrival verify mix ratio, curing, bubble behavior, hardness, and material safety handling.

rows.notes: Seller shipped per Boris Taobao screenshot on 2026-07-07. Smooth-On Dragon Skin 20 2 lb kit for silicone material trials; after arrival verify batch/expiration, A/B mix ratio, curing behavior, and mechanical suitability.

rows.item: Smooth-On Ecoflex 00-30 silicone / Ecoflex 00-30 硅胶
rows.route: Taobao · 东之轩
rows.notes: Seller shipped per Boris Taobao screenshot on 2026-07-07. Smooth-On Ecoflex 00-30 kit for soft silicone / tactile skin material trials; after arrival verify batch/expiration, A/B mix ratio, curing behavior, and softness target.

rows.item: Head-mounted first-person phone holder / 头戴手机支架
rows.route: Taobao · lab procurement
rows.notes: Ordered per Boris update on 2026-07-07. Use as a first-person hands-free operation / repair-view ego-video capture mount; after arrival confirm headband stability, phone clamp size/weight, anti-drop tether, FOV, comfort, and safe static or low-risk use. Do not treat active road-driving filming as an experiment requirement.

rows.item: Cymple face-capture / eye-tracking device
rows.route: Taobao · ship to Singapore/NUS
rows.notes: VRChat-style face and eye capture candidate for human-centric data collection. Selected purchase option from screenshot: headset/category Quest3S, SKU 面捕眼追套装（包含HUB）, page price RMB 900. ClawCross WeChat evidence from 2026-06-23 LV-Robotic Lab 创世工作群: the item was bought, had not shipped yet, the store was presale, expected ship date was 2026-07-12, and destination was Singapore. Verify Quest3S fit, face-capture plus eye-tracking support, HUB inclusion, PC/VRChat data path, and whether the stream can be exported for human-intention / teleop experiments.

rows.item: Unitree SV1-25 mini stereo global-shutter USB camera / 宇树 SV1-25 具身立体双目相机
rows.route: Zheng Yuhang · Taobao
rows.notes: User-provided Taobao candidate marked 假一赔四: Unitree SV1-25 small / mini embodied stereo binocular camera, RGB global-shutter USB camera. ClawCross WeChat evidence from Zheng Yuhang private chat: Boris asked Zheng to place the Taobao order on 2026-07-04, and Zheng replied that the camera would be ordered that day. Next verify tracking, arrival, SDK/driver availability, resolution/FPS, stereo calibration support, ROS/ROS2 or Python access, USB bandwidth, mount compatibility, cable length, and whether it fits wrist/head/fixed-view robot data collection.

rows.item: A3 carbon-steel hollow tube spacer / 碳钢铁 A3 空心套管通孔圆柱
rows.route: Taobao · 大鼎五金
rows.notes: Boris Taobao screenshot at 2026-07-07 20:59 shows this low-cost A3 carbon-steel hollow tube / through-hole round standoff row as 交易成功, visible price RMB 2.4. Screenshot is partially cropped; after receipt verify dimensions, bore, wall thickness, corrosion, and sharp edges before fixture use.

rows.route: Taobao · ship to NUS/COM2

rows.route: Zheng Yuhang · COM2/NUS
